themes.title: User Authentication and Security
themes.description: Enhancing user authentication and security features to ensure compliance and user trust.

themes.title: User Feedback and Engagement
themes.description: Collecting and analyzing user feedback to drive product improvements and reduce churn.

themes.title: Customization and Branding
themes.description: Providing customization options for clients to enhance their branding and user experience.

milestones.name: MVP - SSO/SAML Integration
milestones.description: Implement Single Sign-On (SSO) and SAML integration for user authentication.
milestones.success_criteria: SSO/SAML integration is fully functional and passes security tests.

milestones.name: V1 - User Feedback and Engagement Features
milestones.description: Implement features to collect and analyze user feedback, monitor uptime, and reduce churn.
milestones.success_criteria: All user feedback features are implemented and operational, with at least 75% user engagement.

milestones.name: V2 - White-Label Theming and Custom Domain Support
milestones.description: Implement white-label theming and custom domain support for enhanced branding.
milestones.success_criteria: White-label theming and custom domain support are fully functional and deployed.

sequencing.reason: User feedback and engagement features depend on the successful implementation of SSO/SAML integration.
White-label theming and custom domain support require user feedback features to be in place for effective customization.

mvp.goal: Establish a secure authentication mechanism through SSO/SAML.

v1.goal: Enhance user engagement and feedback mechanisms.
